title: Track Comments Matching a Regular Expression
description: This rule triggers when the full content of a comment matches a given regular expression. The regular expression should be expressed using the dotall format. For example, one can create a rule with the regular expression .*REVIEW.* to match all comments containing "REVIEW".
recommendation: Modify the comment to not match the specified regular expression.
impact: Potential security vulnerabilities or code quality issues may be hidden in comments.

checks.message: Modify the comment to not match the specified regular expression.
